title: Gadget Planet 4.5” 115mm Diamond Cutting Discs For Angle Grinder | Ideal For Cutting Brick Stone Concrete Masonry Asphalt Marble Granite & Most Building Materials | High Precision Clean Cut (6)
features: ✅𝐃𝐈𝐀𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐃 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐈𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: Segmented Diamond Disc Cutting Blade – the epitome of high quality German manufacturing design and durability

✅𝐔𝐍𝐈𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐋 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐁𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘: Suitable for use with all makes of angle grinders, these diamond cutting discs 115mm are specifically designed to provide fast and accurate dry cutting with a high resistance to breakage and long lasting durability.

✅𝐈𝐍𝐃𝐔𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐍𝐆𝐓𝐇: These Diamond Cutting Blades are designed to withstand the toughest cutting tasks and are suitable for many materials, including roof tiles, high-density concrete, masonry, stone, granite, kerbstones, asphalt, roof tiles, slabs, pipes and house bricks.

✅𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄: Experience fast and accurate, wet and dry cutting performance. Suitable for all kinds of 115mm / 4.5” disc cutters and angle grinders. Exceptionally strong and highly resistant to breakage. Suitable for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts.
✅𝐋𝐎𝐍𝐆-𝐋𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘: Gadget Planet Diamond Cutting Blades - Diameter: 115mm (4½") | Bore Size: 22.2mm (7/8") | Diamond Depth: 7mm | Blade Width: 1.9mm | Max Rev: 13000RPM
description: Introducing Gadget Planet Segmented Diamond Cutting Blades – the epitome of high quality German manufacturing precision and durability. These diamond cutting discs are specially designed to provide fast and accurate, wet or dry cutting. The Gadget Planet cutting discs for angle grinder are ideal for use on many materials, including roof tiles, high-density concrete, masonry, stone, granite, kerbstones, asphalt, roof tiles, slabs, pipes and house bricks. These Diamond Cutting Bladesare exceptionally strong, highly resistant to breakage and provide outstanding cutting performance, a consistent depth and a long cutting life. The Gadget Planet Diamond Cutting Blades are manufactured by the same German company that also produces branded blades for the market for a much higher price. You decide whether you want to pay for the branded blade or just the blade! These 115mm cutting discs are suitable for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts. Fits Most 115mm / 4.5" Disc Cutters / Angle Grinders Diameter: 115mm (4½") | Bore Size: 22.2mm (7/8") | Diamond Depth: 7mm | Blade Width: 1.9mm Max Rev: 13000RPM
